excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that a copy-output repair is equivalent to free learned value generation
supported: A matched copy-decoder repair audit over the Stage 45-48 train-short/test-long rows.
Evidence about whether retrieval failure persists after replacing the learned vocab output with copied prefix-token mass.
Validation-selected positional scale, five-seed aggregation, calibration metrics, and failed-run retention across the fair method set.

decision.claim_boundary: Copy-output repair helps at least one retrieval lane but does not solve the full retrieval set.

model.content_signal: tiny_text_fact_qa uses query entity to score matching fact spans; retrieval lanes use positional mechanism only
model.trained_parameters: none; positional scale selected on validation split
